basic_details.job_title: DRDO RAC Scientist Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 33 Scientist C, Scientist D and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Defence Research and Development Organisation (DRDO), Recruitment & Assessment Centre (RAC), Lucknow Road, Timarpur, Delhi – 110054
basic_details.post_name: Scientist E (Basic Pay: Rs. 1,23,100/-, Level 13), Scientist D (Basic Pay: Rs. 78,800/-, Level 12), Scientist C (Basic Pay: Rs. 67,700/-, Level 11)
basic_details.short_information: DRDO RAC is recruiting Scientists (Scientist E, D, and C) across multiple engineering and science disciplines on regular basis under Lateral Recruitment Scheme, closing date 19 June 2026.

important_dates.interview_date: To be intimated through RAC website and Email/SMS

application_fee.details: Application fee is non-refundable and non-transferable, payable online only.

age_limit.details: Age limit is as on the closing date of advertisement (19 June 2026). Maximum age shall not exceed 56 years including any relaxation. For Scientist C (Encadered posts) – there is no age relaxation under reserved categories.

qualification.details: Only Indian Nationals can apply. The date for determining the eligibility of all candidates in every respect shall be the prescribed Closing Date (19 June 2026). First Division means 60% marks; where CGPA/CPI of 6.75 on a 10-point scale will be taken as equivalent to 60% as per AICTE guidelines. No rounding off of marks is permitted.
qualification.education_qualification: At least First Division Bachelor's Degree in Engineering/Technology in the relevant discipline OR First Division Master's Degree in the relevant discipline from a recognized University. (As detailed post-wise above)
qualification.experience: Post-qualification experience only (experience counted only after passing the essential qualification). Scientist E: 11 years; Scientist D: 7 years; Scientist C: 3 years (as on closing date). Experience below Pay Level 10 as per 7th CPC or equivalent will not be considered.

vacancy_details.Essential Qualifications & Experience: i. At least First Division Bachelor's Degree in Engineering or Technology in Electronics & Communication Engineering from a recognized university or equivalent. ii. Minimum 11 years' of experience in Research or Design or Development in the field of Digital communication and engineering.
vacancy_details.Desirable: i. Knowledge in ground and space-based communication systems and navigation. ii. Knowledge in RTL Design and verification. iii. Knowledge in handling test and measurement equipments like signal Generators, spectrum analysis and Network analysis. iv. Post Doctoral / Doctorate Degree in Engineering or Master's Degree in Engineering or Technology in relevant field. v. Knowledge of German, French, Russian, Japanese or Chinese. vi. Three years' experience in Research and Development Management to manage and coordinate science & technology related activities in the area of Project Management or Material Management or Resource Management or Organisational Development.

vacancy_details.Essential Qualifications & Experience (S: First Division BE/B.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering + Minimum 7 years' experience in Research or Design or Development in Software Engineering. Desirable: Knowledge in C, C++, MATLAB/Simulink; simulation for space; Post Doctoral/Doctorate/Master's in relevant field; foreign language knowledge.

First Division BE/B.Tech in Aeronautical / Aerospace Engineering + Minimum 7 years' experience in Aero Configuration Design & Analysis and Aero Characterization. Desirable: Post Doctoral/Doctorate/Master's; German/French/Russian/Japanese/Chinese.

First Division BE/B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering + Minimum 7 years' experience in research/design/development in: Design & analysis of mechanical systems of Gas turbine engine using Finite Element techniques, validation and testing. Desirable: Experience in turbo machinery/structural/thermal/hydraulic/modal/shock/fatigue/material non-linear/composite structure analysis; noise, vibration and shock mitigation strategies; Post Doctoral/Doctorate/Master's; foreign language.

vacancy_details.Subject/Discipline: Physics / Photonics / Optics & Opto-Electronics / Engineering Physics*
vacancy_details.Essential Qualifications & Experience (S: At least First Division Master's Degree in Physics/Photonics OR First Division BE/B.Tech in Optics & Opto-Electronics / Engineering Physics + Minimum 7 years' experience in research/design/development/production in Optics/Photonics areas (Coherent/Incoherent Imaging, Hyper-spectral, Polarimetric, Computational, Quantum Enhanced Imaging, Optical/Opto-mechanical system design, Optical prototype development). Desirable: Post Doctoral/Doctorate/Master's in Optical/Opto-Electronic/Applied Optics/Photonics fields; foreign language.

First Division BE/B.Tech in Chemical Engineering + Minimum 7 years' experimental research in: Design & Development of Process Chemical Plant for under water power generation; Modeling and Process Simulation; Development of Fuel cell-based Energy Module plant. Desirable: Post Doctoral/Doctorate/Master's; foreign language.

First Division BE/B.Tech in Chemical Engineering + Minimum 7 years' experience in research/design/development/production in two or more of: R&D in process development/reactors design; Modeling of thermodynamics & kinetics; Hydro/Pyro/Electro metallurgical processes; Scale-up of chemical processes. Desirable: Metallurgical extraction/beneficiation experience; modeling and simulation tools; process safety, risk assessment; Post Doctoral/Doctorate/Master's; foreign language.

First Division BE/B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering + Minimum 7 years' experience in: Realization or Integration & Testing of Solid Propulsion System; Mechanical Systems Assembly & Integration; Composites Pressure Vessels & Nozzles; QA/Non-destructive Testing. Desirable: Post Doctoral/Doctorate/Master's; foreign language.

First Division BE/B.Tech in E&C Engg + Minimum 3 years' experience in research or design or development in Electronics & Communication Systems and Engineering. Desirable: MATLAB/Simulink simulation for communication; testing of E&C systems for Satellite sub-systems; Doctorate/Master's; foreign language.

First Division BE/B.Tech in E&C Engg + Minimum 3 years' experience in research/design/development/production in: Hardware & Software design using MATLAB/C/C++; FPGA based hardware & firmware using Verilog/VHDL; Machine learning/deep learning techniques; cross compilation tool chain; performance optimization on hardware constrained environment. Desirable: Doctorate in VLSI/Signal Processing or Master's in VLSI Design/Signal Processing; foreign language.

First Division BE/B.Tech in E&C/Telecommunication Engg + Minimum 3 years' experience in research or design or development in Signal Processing / Image Processing / RF Engineering. Desirable: Doctorate/Master's; foreign language.

First Division BE/B.Tech in CSE + Minimum 3 years' experience in research or design or development in Artificial Intelligence / Machine Learning / Deep Learning / Data Processing. Desirable: Doctorate/Master's; foreign language.

First Division BE/B.Tech in Electronics/E&C Engg + Minimum 3 years' experience in two or more of: Digital Hardware Design; FPGA based firmware development; EDA tools for RTL simulation & synthesis; System on chip design; SOC based hardware realization and testing. Desirable: Doctorate/Master's specializing in VLSI/Embedded System; foreign language.

First Division BE/B.Tech in E&C Engineering + Minimum 3 years' experience in research or design or development in Communication Engineering. Desirable: Doctorate/Master's in Signal Processing or Communication; foreign language.

First Division BE/B.Tech in CSE + Minimum 3 years' experience in two or more of: AI/ML for scientific application; High Performance Computing for Signal/Data Processing; C/C++ for real-time/embedded systems on Linux/VxWorks/MS Windows; Python and open source ML frameworks (TensorFlow, Pytorch); Software Life Cycle Management; Software Development Lab setup; Database design for Business Intelligence. Desirable: Doctorate/Master's specializing in CSE/AI/ML/Software Engg; foreign language.

First Division BE/B.Tech in Electronics/E&C Engg + Minimum 3 years' experience in two or more of: Antenna system/Phased Array Antennas; Photonics & Optical technologies for RF and Microwaves; 5G Communication in RF and Microwave domain; Drone based antenna/Radar Characterization and RF payload development. Desirable: Doctorate/Master's specializing in RF/Photonics/Optical Communication; foreign language.

At least First Division Master's Degree in Oceanography / Physical Oceanography + Minimum 3 years' research experience in Physical Oceanography. Desirable: Experience in Sea data collection, data analysis and interpretation/Ocean Modeling, Remote sensing in Oceanography; Doctorate/Master's in Engineering/Technology in oceanography/marine sciences; foreign language.

vacancy_details.Subject/Discipline: Mathematics / Mathematics and Computing / Mathematical Science / Applied Mathematics*
vacancy_details.Essential Qualifications & Experience (S: At least First Division Master's Degree in Mathematics/Mathematics and Computing/Mathematical Science/Applied Mathematics OR First Division BE/B.Tech in Mathematics and Computing/Applied Mathematics + Minimum 3 years' experience in research & development in Applied Mathematics/Operational Research/Modeling & Simulation/optimization or related fields. Desirable: Knowledge of Programming Language; specialization in OR/Statistics; Doctorate/Master's; foreign language.

First Division BE/B.Tech in Chemical Engineering + Minimum 3 years' experience in research or design or development or production in High Energy Materials: Propellants, Explosives. Desirable: Doctorate/Master's in Chemical Engineering; foreign language.

At least First Division Master's Degree in Physiology + Minimum 3 years' research experience in Human Physiology OR A Medical Qualification included in First/Second Schedule or Part II of Third Schedule to the Indian Medical Council Act, 1956 + Post Graduate Degree/MD in Physiology + Three Years' Research Experience. Desirable: Experience in Environmental/Cardio-Vascular/Neuro/High-Altitude Physiology; Doctorate in Human Physiology; foreign language.

First Division BE/B.Tech in Electrical Engineering + Minimum 3 years' experience in research or design or development or manufacturing in power systems (transmission/distribution), related machineries and power electronics. Desirable: Experience in Electrical energy systems (generation, storage, distribution, automation and management) including planning, research, development, field work; Doctorate/Master's; foreign language.

At least First Class Master's Degree in M.Pharmacy (Pharmacology) or M.Sc. (Pharmacology) + Minimum 3 years' experience in Immuno Pharmacology / Formulation design and development / Medicinal chemistry / natural product chemistry / drug designing. Desirable: Doctorate Degree in Pharmacy; foreign language.

vacancy_details.Subject/Discipline: Remote Sensing / Remote Sensing & GIS / Geoinformatics / Geomatics / Civil*
vacancy_details.Essential Qualifications & Experience (S: At least First Division Master's Degree in Science in Remote Sensing / Remote Sensing & GIS / Geoinformatics / Geomatics OR First Division BE/B.Tech in Civil Engineering / Geomatics Engineering / Geoinformatics + Minimum 3 years' experience in: Remote Sensing & GIS / Geospatial Technologies for Geo-hazards (Avalanche/Landslide/Snow/Glacier Lakes) analysis and assessment; Application of Optical/Microwave/Hyperspectral/Thermal/LiDAR data for Topographic Analysis & Mapping. Desirable: Exposure to Remote sensing image processing & GIS packages; AI/ML/DL/Soft Computing Techniques for geospatial data analysis; Doctorate in Remote Sensing/Geoinformatics or Master's in Engineering/Technology with experience in Remote Sensing/Geoinformatics; foreign language.

vacancy_details.Essential Qualifications & Experience: First Division BE/B.Tech in Mechanical/Production/Production & Industrial Engineering/Aeronautical/Aerospace Engineering + Minimum 11 years' experience in field of design or development or fabrication of Mechanical/Aero Systems. Desirable: 3 years' experience in R&D Management; Post Doctoral/Doctorate/Master's; foreign language.

vacancy_details.Essential Qualifications & Experience (S: First Division BE/B.Tech in relevant discipline + Minimum 7 years' experience in design or development of Mechanical/Aero Systems; Integration; Assembly and servicing of Material Handling equipment; Assembly, Integration and QA/QC of Mechanical systems; design and fabrication of mechanical system. Desirable: Post Doctoral/Doctorate/Master's; foreign language.

vacancy_details.Subject/Discipline: Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering / Electronics and Communication Engineering / Electronics Communication Engineering@
vacancy_details.Essential Qualifications & Experience (S: First Division BE/B.Tech in Electronics and Telecommunication/Electronics and Communication Engg + Minimum 7 years' experience in design and development of communication systems / Signal Conditioning / Electronics and Signal Processing. Desirable: Post Doctoral/Doctorate/Master's; foreign language.

At least First Division Master's Degree / M.Sc. in Physics / Radiation Physics + Minimum 7 years' experience in: Installation/commissioning of radiation monitoring systems in power generation plants; Radiation safety with experience working on radiation safety related sensors/equipment. Desirable: Working experience in Power Generation Plants/Shipyards; Certification course on Radiological Calibration Laboratories or valid RSO (Radiation Safety Officer) license for at least one year; Post Doctoral/Doctorate/Master's in Radiation safety; foreign language.

First Division BE/B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering + Minimum 7 years' experience in research or design or development in design analysis of equipment using Finite Element (FE) Method / Design Standards / FE modeling / meshing and analysis using Hyper mesh / Ansys APDL and Ansys Workbench. Desirable: Experience in Naval equipment structural/thermal/hydraulic/modal/shock/fatigue/material non-linear analysis using Abaqus software; noise, vibration and shock mitigation; life estimation of polymer products; Post Doctoral/Doctorate/Master's; foreign language.

vacancy_details.Subject/Discipline: Physics (Medical Physics / Radiological Physics / Medical Radiation Physics)*
vacancy_details.Essential Qualifications & Experience (S: At least First Division Master's Degree in Physics OR First Division Master's Degree in Radiological Physics/Medical Physics/Medical Physics (Approved by AERB) + Minimum 3 years' work experience in Radiological Safety (RSO-Medical Radiation Facilities) including internship in a recognised radiation therapy department. Candidate must be RSO (Medical) certified by BARC, Mumbai or equivalent. Desirable: Post M.Sc. Diploma in Radiological/Medical Physics (Approved by AERB); Doctorate in Radiation Safety (equals 3 years).

First Division BE/B.Tech in Electronics & Communication Engineering / Mechanical Engineering + Minimum 3 years' work experience in research or development in field of Ballistics / Applied Ballistics / Armament Technology / Weapon Systems or relevant areas. Desirable: Doctoral/Master's Degree in relevant field; foreign language.

selection_process: Screening of received applications will be carried out at multiple stages. Final selection is purely based on merit of marks scored in the Final Personal Interview.
Stage 1 – Administrative Screening: Verification of identity
length of suitable experience and CCA Declaration (wherever applicable).

Stage 2 – Technical Screening (Level-1): For all Administratively Eligible candidates - Technical Screening by holding a Meeting of Technical Screening Committee (an independent body including Technical Experts from Industry/Academia/DRDO other than RAC) using Bio-data based Technical Screening at Level-1 by: (a) Relevance of suitable experience w.r.t. advertised qualifications; (b) Relevance of Desirable/Higher Qualification; (c) Any other criteria suggested by Technical Screening Committee. Predefined Ratio for Preliminary Online Interview: Up to 24 candidates for 1 post; up to 48 candidates for 2 posts.
Stage 3 – Technical Screening (Level-2 / Preliminary Online Interview
if required): If number shortlisted for Final Personal Interview is large

further shortlisting via Preliminary Online Interview of short duration (10–15 minutes). Predefined Ratio for Final Personal Interview: Up to 12 candidates for 1 post; up to 24 candidates for 2 posts.
Stage 4 – Final Personal Interview (in-person at RAC

Delhi): Final selection is purely on merit of marks scored. Candidates must score a minimum of 75% marks (75 out of 100) in the Final Personal Interview for consideration for selection. The Final Personal Interview will be held in-person only before the Selection Board at RAC
Delhi on the scheduled date - no online/virtual interview will be considered.
Note: If administrative screening does not result in minimum 6 eligible candidates against one vacancy
the subsequent selection process for that vacancy may be cancelled. If technical screening does not result in minimum 6 candidates per vacancy for Final Personal Interview
the number of vacancies will be reduced accordingly.

physical_eligibility.details: The competition level for DRDO RAC Scientist Recruitment 2026 is expected to be very high, particularly for Scientist C posts in Electronics & Communication Engineering, Computer Science & Engineering, and Mechanical Engineering - disciplines with a large pool of eligible candidates and growing interest in DRDO's prestigious research environment. DRDO provides one of the best career growth structures for scientists under the Flexible Complimenting Scheme (FCS), making it a highly sought-after employer. | The multi-stage shortlisting process (Administrative → Technical Level-1 → Level-2/Preliminary Online Interview → Final Personal Interview in Delhi) is rigorous. Only up to 12 candidates per vacancy reach the Final Personal Interview, and even among those, a minimum of 75% marks in the interview is mandatory for selection. For Scientist D and E posts requiring 7–11 years of experience, the competition narrows to experienced professionals, but the specificity of required experience (e.g., Optics/Photonics, Radiation Physics, Chemical Engineering for underwater applications) naturally limits the eligible pool, making those posts relatively less competitive. Niche posts like Oceanography, Pharmacology, and Remote Sensing will see very limited candidates, improving selection chances for well-qualified applicants.

how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply online through the RAC website (https://rac.gov.in) for filling the online application form. Applications received through any other mode will not be entertained. On successful registration, candidates may login and submit the online application before the closing date to avoid last minute network congestion. Only locked/finalised applications in all respects shall be considered. No correction in the data/application will be allowed and no document will be accepted once the application is finally submitted/locked.
Candidates should retain a printout/copy of the online application (.pdf format) after submission.

Important: ESSENTIAL ELIGIBILITY DOCUMENTS INCLUDING PROOFS FOR DATE OF BIRTH / ESSENTIAL QUALIFICATION / CCA DECLARATION (IF APPLICABLE) WILL NOT BE ACCEPTED AT ANY STAGE AFTER ADVERTISEMENT CLOSING DATE.
Documents Required at time of Interview (Originals + Copies):
Date of Birth (DOB) proof - Self attested Matriculation / High School certificate / Birth Certificate
A recent passport size colour photograph (not exceeding 30 KB)
Scanned sample of candidate's signature (not exceeding 30 KB)
Self-attested degree certificates/testimonials regarding Essential and Higher qualification along with mark-sheets
Fellowship proofs mentioning start date and end date of fellowship (if applicable)
Notarized affidavit in support (if name mismatch in documents)
Notarized/certified transcript if documents are in language other than English or Hindi

All experience certificates (with start and end date) and salary Proofs / Appointment letter (with pay scale or CTC), Promotion letters (with revised scales or CTC), Form 16A and Salary slips (beginning and end of each employment)
Requisite caste / disability certificate (for SC/ST/Divyang – for fee waiver only)
Requisite Release certificate (if retired Armed Forces personnel)
CCA Declaration (applicable) and NOC at Final Personal Interview stage
important_instructions: All candidates must apply online through https://rac.gov.in only. No other mode of application is accepted. Closing Date: 19 June 2026 (1600 hrs.) - facility for online application submission will remain available on RAC website only up to this time. Do not divulge any confidential information related to work experience of present or previous employer while filling the application; RAC shall not be held responsible for revelation of such information. Ensure candidate's name and parents' names are filled exactly as in Date of Birth proof; name mismatch requires notarized affidavit at time of filling the online application. For multiple posts - apply separately for each post and mention item numbers and order of preference in each application. Do not change registered mobile number or Email after application - vital information about eligibility/shortlisting/selection status will be intimated through Email/SMS only. Only locked/finalised applications shall be considered - no correction will be allowed after final submission. Preview application with all uploaded documents before final submission. The maximum file size of each document/certificate should not exceed 500 KB; uploaded documents must be legible/readable and not password protected. Final Personal Interview will be held in-person at RAC, Delhi only - no online/virtual interview mode will be considered under any circumstances. Candidates must score minimum 75% marks (75 out of 100) in Final Personal Interview for consideration for selection. Selected candidates will have liability to serve anywhere in India including remote/field area locations as per Central Government Rules. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidate. RAC does not request for any payment at any stage of recruitment process except the application fee. No such demand should be entertained. Any dispute will be subject to the Hon'ble Courts/Tribunals having jurisdiction over Delhi only. DRDO under DPDP Act 2023 declares that candidate's personal data received through online application will be processed for recruitment purpose only. Incomplete applications will be summarily rejected. The number of vacancies may vary; RAC reserves the right to modify the screening/shortlisting procedure depending upon availability of suitable candidates.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply?
faq.answer: The online application window closes on 19 June 2026 at 1600 hrs (IST).

faq.question: Q2. How do I apply?
faq.answer: Apply online only via the RAC website: https://rac.gov.in. Applications by any other mode will not be accepted.

faq.question: Q3. Which posts are advertised?
faq.answer: Direct recruitment for Scientist E (Level 13), Scientist D (Level 12) and Scientist C (Level 11) in DRDS cadre and encadered posts under the Lateral Recruitment Scheme. See notification for discipline-wise item numbers.

faq.question: Q4. What are the essential academic requirements?
faq.answer: First Division (60% or equivalent) in the prescribed degree: BE/B.Tech/First Division M.Sc. or equivalent as specified for each post. CGPA/CPI conversions must be supported by university rules (6.75/10 = 60%).

faq.question: Q5. What is the required post-qualification experience?
faq.answer: Scientist E: 11 years; Scientist D: 7 years; Scientist C: 3 years — experience counted only after the essential qualification and as on 19 June 2026. Experience below Pay Level 10 (7th CPC) is not counted.

faq.question: Q6. Is there an application fee?
faq.answer: Yes. General/OBC/EWS (male) candidates pay Rs. 100 online. SC/ST/Divyang/Women candidates are exempt.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process?
faq.answer: Multi-stage: Administrative screening → Technical Screening (Level‑1) → Technical Screening Level‑2/Preliminary Online Interview (if needed) → Final Personal Interview (in-person at RAC, Delhi). Final selection is based on interview marks; minimum 75/100 required in the Final Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Can serving government/PSU employees apply?
faq.answer: Yes, but they must upload a signed CCA Declaration during online submission and produce NOC from Cadre Controlling Authority (CCA) at the Final Personal Interview stage.

faq.question: Q9. Are online/virtual interviews allowed for the final stage?
faq.answer: No. The Final Personal Interview is strictly in-person at RAC, Delhi; no online/virtual final interviews are permitted.

faq.question: Q10. What common mistakes should I avoid before submitting the application?
faq.answer: Applying without First Division (60%) in the essential degree. Including overlapping PhD/study periods as work experience. Not providing required pay/CTC proof for private-sector experience. Failing to upload signed CCA Declaration (where applicable). Submitting documents in other languages without notarized English/Hindi transcripts. Changing registered email/phone after submission (all communications will use registered contacts).
